name: Joyland Amusement Park
city: 500 Canyon Lake Drive, Lubbock, Texas United States
description: Joyland Amusement Park was a small family-owned traditional amusement park, located in Lubbock, Texas, United States within Lubbock's Mackenzie Park.  It typically operated from March to September of each year, opening six days a week but only during the evening on weeknights.
